reapack.name: ReaRanger_fA.lua
reapack.desc: ReaRanger fA - Realtime Region List Editor

version.author: foxAsteria
version.changelog:
v0.7.28 — Length/duration entry honours the Time/Beats toggle everywhere (was seconds-only in three spots): the +Region length field, the gap field, and the lane hover "len" readout. Values stay seconds internally.
v0.7.27 — CONTENT-COMPLETE moves. New carry_content() primitive: reordering a region or free-moving it on the lane now carries the media items AND the track automation (envelope points) AND normal markers AND tempo/timesig markers in the span — not just the audio items. 100% deterministic set-absolute (no native ripple, pref/timebase-independent). NOTE on beats-timebase projects: moving tempo markers re-warps beat-anchored content (REAPER's anchoring) — flat-tempo and time-timebase projects are unaffected.
v0.7.26 — Ctrl+drag-DUPLICATE on the lane: hold Ctrl and drag a region to clone it (marker + the media items in its span) to the drop point. Respects the Insert/Lanes toggle. Items cloned via state chunk with regenerated GUIDs.
v0.7.25 — Title-band text readability: app-name and info/stats line both use the near-white title color.
v0.7.19 — Ship release. Realtime region-list editor / lite arranger: - Reorder regions (list or lane) and the media content moves with them. - Insert gaps (single-click +Gap, double-click to type exact length). - Per-digit time drag (grab minutes / seconds / ms independently; Ctrl = fine). - Lane drag to reorder, drag edges to resize; beats/time toggle. - In-place rename (double-click), custom color picker per region.
BETA: actively developed — expect rough edges. A per-session telemetry log is written under REAPER's Data/ReaRanger/ for diagnosing moves. Requires ReaImGui (install via ReaPack: ReaTeam Extensions).

metadata.description:
ReaRanger fA is a lightweight region-list arranger for REAPER. It shows your project regions as an editable list plus an overview lane; reordering a region physically moves the content under it — media items, track automation, normal markers, and tempo/timesig markers all travel together. Inserting a gap opens silence and slides later audio right. Per-digit time dragging, in-place rename, custom per-region colors, and a beats/time display toggle. Built by foxAsteria with Claude.
BETA — actively developed. A per-session telemetry log is written under REAPER's Data/ReaRanger/ folder to help diagnose move behavior.
Requires the ReaImGui extension (install via ReaPack from the ReaTeam Extensions repository).
